findings: Fall protection compliant on all elevated steel work. One worker observed without safety vest at ground level materials staging. Housekeeping in gate area B needs attention – debris accumulating near stair tower. Fire extinguisher at PE trailer tagged past annual inspection date.
corrective_actions: Issued safety vest on site. Debris cleared from stair tower area and housekeeping added to superintendent daily checklist. Fire extinguisher replaced. All items resolved same day.

findings: Crane certification current and load charts posted. One aerial lift with inoperable horn – removed from service. Excavator daily inspection logs complete and current. Compressor OSHA data plate visible and relief valve tested OK. All rigging gear certified and tagged.
corrective_actions: Aerial lift removed from service and tagged. Work order submitted to manufacturer service center. Replacement lift deployed from yard.

findings: All fall protection systems compliant. PPE compliance 100% at random check of 22 workers. Tool storage and housekeeping excellent on Level 1. One missing ground fault circuit interrupter on temporary power circuit at Level 3 – corrected immediately.
corrective_actions: GFCI installed on circuit. Confirmed compliant before end of inspection. No outstanding items.
